tex:
Maria buys $n$ pencils that cost $p$ cents each.
\newline
\\

\newline

\newline
\\
Give your answer in cents.
\newline

_rawBody:
Maria buys $n$ pencils that cost $p$ cents each.\\
She pays with a \$$y$ note.

Find, in terms of $n$, $p$ and $y$, the amount of change Maria receives.\\
Give your answer in cents.

\WorkingSpace{3cm}

\AnswerLine[][cents]
\Marks{2}

tex:

\\

\newline

(c) 27 students pass both mathematics and English.
\newline

(d) 19 students do not pass mathematics and do not pass English.
\newline

\newline

 Use the Venn diagram to find $\text{n}(E)$.
\newline

Use set notation to describe the shaded region.
\newline

content.content:
A group of 120 students take two tests, mathematics and English.
\newline
\\
Here is some information about the number of students who pass mathematics ($M$) and who pass English ($E$).
\newline

\begin{parts}

61 students pass mathematics.
\newline

27 students pass both mathematics and English.
\newline

19 students do not pass mathematics and do not pass English.
\newline
